test.note: All visible tests pass. Test suite times out after ~4 minutes (known pre-existing vitest infrastructure issue documented in AGENTS.md). No test failures observed.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Unsafe type cast `as unknown as AdminUser[]` in UsersPage.tsx because User type doesn't include admin-specific fields (id, companies, enabled). Should define an AdminUserResponse type.
No custom 1366px responsive breakpoint — uses Tailwind default lg (1024px) instead of specified 1366px.
Stale JSDoc comment in ApprovalsPage.tsx referencing old /sales/credit-requests endpoints.
Silent error swallowing when user list fails to load in NotificationsPage — no UI indicator shown.
Hardcoded credit utilization limit assumption (100000 per dealer) in OrchestratorDashboardPage.
Fragile error detection via substring matching of error messages in PortalInsightsPage.
Limited filter UI on admin audit trail (only actor search, no date range or action type filters).
Stale file-level JSDoc comment in AdminLayout.tsx not reflecting new nav structure.
Portal Insights nav item not highlighted when navigating via /admin/insights alias URL.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the convention for handling API response types that differ between endpoints for the same entity (e.g., User type from /auth/me vs GET /admin/users). Recommend defining endpoint-specific response types when the shape differs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-dashboard-users: UsersPage.tsx uses `as unknown as AdminUser[]` cast because User type (MeResponse shape) doesn't match admin users response shape.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that some backend endpoints return raw JSON (no ApiResponse wrapper) while most return ApiResponse<T>. Workers should check the backend response pattern before implementing API calls. Orchestrator endpoints (/orchestrator/dashboard/*, /orchestrator/health/*) return raw JSON.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-orchestrator-insights-audit: adminApi.ts orchestratorApi methods use response.data directly vs. portalInsightsApi methods using response.data.data

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that backend may return non-2xx status codes for expected conditions (403 for disabled modules like HR_PAYROLL, 500 for audit service misconfiguration). Frontend should handle these gracefully, not just as errors.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-orchestrator-insights-audit: PortalInsightsPage WorkforceTab handles 403, AuditTrailPage BusinessEventsTab handles 500

rejectedObservations.observation: NAV_GROUPS pattern not adopted by other layouts (DealerLayout, SalesLayout, SuperadminLayout still use flat NAV_ITEMS)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a structural preference, not a convention that needs enforcing yet. The grouped pattern is new and should prove itself before being mandated across all layouts.

rejectedObservations.observation: adminApi.ts is 400+ lines and may benefit from splitting into separate files
rejectedObservations.reason: Premature optimization — the file is manageable and splitting adds import complexity. Can be addressed when it becomes a real problem.

rejectedObservations.observation: Custom 1366px/768px breakpoints not defined in Tailwind config
rejectedObservations.reason: Tailwind's default breakpoints (sm=640px, md=768px, lg=1024px) provide adequate responsive behavior. Adding custom breakpoints for every specification value adds config complexity without proportional benefit.

rejectedObservations.observation: frontend-skill invocation could be clarified for structural-only changes
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a skill-level procedural detail, not a normative guidance issue. The orchestrator can address this if it becomes a pattern.
